---
title: "London Pride."
---

## London Pride.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1848
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London, and Joseph Masters, 78, New Bond Street, London

### Notes

Copies in Lambeth Palace Library,  University of Sheffield Library and the University of Delaware Library. It was reprinted in <i>The Christmas Mummers and Other Stories</i> (1876).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
